Welcome

Villarreal & Sons Electric

Villarreal & Sons Electric has been serving El Paso and the surrounding region with premium electrician services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why El Paso Trusts Villarreal & Sons Electric

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
